Next implementation loop starts from documentation build/TASK-075 rather than chat memory.

next_loop.reason: Implementation should start from artifacts and avoid relying on feedback chat context.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset
Documentation build and TASK-075 contain implementation-ready acceptance and verification criteria.
next_loop.handoff: Resume TASK-075 with this documentation build as planning context.

requirements.text: Product view must use progressive disclosure: default workspace shows user stories and UI surfaces first; users, source files, and deeper detail appear only after user choice or contextual need.
The right drawer may remain, but its default content must be valuable to users: meaning, alignment, evidence, warnings, and next safe action before backend paths or raw artifact data.
Board view should become a retro terminal-like Kanban board for active roadmap work, gates, blockers, and next actions.
Across CodeWiki UI, every surface should optimize for observability and alignment, reducing visible information until it helps answer intended state, actual state, gap, and next action.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Accepted Product progressive disclosure is documented.
evidence_mapping.evidence: .codewiki/kb/product/uis/control-room.md and .codewiki/kb/system/control-room-ui.md now require Product landing to show User Stories and UI Surfaces first.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Accepted source drawer direction is documented.
evidence_mapping.evidence: .codewiki/kb/product/uis/control-room.md and .codewiki/kb/system/control-room-ui.md now require value-first drawer content with raw sources collapsed.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Accepted retro Kanban Board direction is documented and executable.
evidence_mapping.evidence: .codewiki/kb/product/uis/board.md and TASK-075 require deterministic roadmap-backed retro Kanban lanes.

summary: Documented accepted CodeWiki UI direction for progressive disclosure, value-first right source drawer, and retro Kanban Board; created TASK-075 for implementation.

.codewiki/kb/system/control-room-ui.md: aligned web UI system contract with source drawer, Product default, and Board Kanban behavior.
